D11 ComputationalL2 UnderstandReference

CNN Colorisation — Zhang 2016 Architecture

U-Net regresses Lab a*b* channels from grayscale L*; trained on ImageNet to learn colour priors — "this is grass, colour it green; this is sky, colour it blue"

Modern colourisation predicts ab values per pixel given L. Loss balances classification (256-bin ab quantization) and perceptual fidelity. Tends to be conservative — predicts averages → desaturated outputs. GAN-based methods (DeOldify) add discriminator loss to push saturation.

Slide temperature; high T predicts boldly, low T sticks to safe greys.
